visual_principles: texture-first backgrounds instead of flat fills

website_surfaces.prompt: Premium horror web hero scene, remote detective team, muted amber and slate palette, atmospheric depth, elegant negative space for headline and CTA, cinematic realism.
Set of polished trust badge backplates for premium mystery platform, subtle distress textures, editorial composition, clean icon-safe zones.
Panoramic case-library banner, mystery dossier wall, layered evidence photos and red thread map, premium dark editorial style.
Investigation board background texture, cork and archival paper blend, subtle grain, high readability overlays for cards and timeline.
Commercial subscription offer visual for premium horror platform, elegant typography-safe space, cinematic intrigue, conversion-focused composition.

story_asset_templates.prompt_template: Character portrait for {story_id}, dramatic practical lighting, emotionally expressive realism, non-campy, premium color grade.
Story scene art for {story_id}, key location establishing shot, atmosphere-heavy cinematic realism, hidden clue affordance.
Evidence still for {story_id}, documentary forensic framing, timestamp and metadata cues, believable artifact wear.
Promotional key art for {story_id}, commercial launch-ready composition, suspense and curiosity hook.
Social teaser creative for {story_id}, vertical and square-safe composition, shareable hook line space.
